arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund show interest in Randal Kolo Muani
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe (via FT), Borussia Dortmund have expressed an interest in signing Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani. It had previously been reported that Manchester United and RB Leipzig…

arts.ttl: Chelsea demand £20m-plus for Renato Veiga as Dortmund target loan deal
arts.sum: German club keen on loan with option to buy Veiga joined Chelsea for £12m last summer Chelsea are asking for more than £20m to sell Renato Veiga, who is wanted by Borussia Dortmund on loan with an option to buy. Veiga, who can play at left-back, centre-back or in central midfield, is keen for a new challenge despite joining Chelsea for £12m from FC Basel last summer. The 21-year-old, who is said to have agreed terms with Dortmund, has made seven Premier League appearances and is keen to find regular football. Continue reading...

The Bundesliga resumed after the winter pause with injury-hit Dortmund losing 3-2 to Leverkusen under the Friday evening floodlights. Apart from their two wins, Kiel, German champions way back in 191...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa close in on deal for Borussia Dortmund’s Donyell Malen
arts.sum: According to Bild, Aston Villa are closing in on a deal for Borussia Dortmund forward Donyell Malen. It had previously been reported that the Premier League outfit were keen on…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund unwilling to meet Chelsea’s demands for Renato Veiga
arts.sum: According to Patrick Berger, Borussia Dortmund are unwilling to meet Chelsea’s demands for left-back Renato Veiga. It has previously been reported that BvB have agreed on personal terms with the…

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano shares why Renato Veiga is ‘pushing’ to leave Chelsea as Blues make decision on his future
Chelsea star will only be allowed to join Borussia Dortmund on a PERMANENT deal this month, amid loan interest - as two Premier League rivals eye-up £12m-rated international
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: This included all 90 minutes of the 5-0 thumping of League Two strugglers Morecambe on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Dortmund keen to sign Chelsea defender Veiga
arts.sum: German side Borussia Dortmund open talks to sign Chelsea defender Renato Veiga on an initial loan deal.

arts.ttl: Dortmund reportedly agree personal terms with Chelsea defender
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund have reached an agreement in principle with Chelsea's Renato Veiga.
